subcodes.first_line: O Son! It behooveth thee to aid thy Lord in these days and to speak forth in Our Most Great and Glorious Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابن ینبغی لک بان تنصر ربک فی تلک الایام و تنطق باسمنا الاعظم العظیم
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @call to action, @suffering and imprisonment, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
